description: This Java class serves as a REST controller for managing loan application draft endpoints in a Spring Boot application. It provides CRUD operations for loan drafts including creation, listing, retrieval, updating, partial section updates, and deletion. The class interacts with a service layer to perform business logic and enforces authentication via JWT tokens, using the user ID extracted from the token's subject.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftController
classes.description: REST controller providing endpoints for managing loan application drafts, including create, list, retrieve, update, patch section, and delete operations. It enforces JWT-based authentication and interacts with a service layer to handle business logic.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan application draft for the authenticated user using data from the request body.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Retrieves a list of all loan application drafts belonging to the authenticated user.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Fetches a specific loan draft by ID, verifying ownership.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Replaces a loan draft's data based on provided update request, enforcing concurrency if needed.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section of a loan draft, merging JSON data and optionally updating status and current step.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a specific loan draft if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts the UUID user ID from the authenticated JWT token's subject. Throws exception if unauthenticated or subject is invalid.
